description: Black leather watch from maxima with classically minimalist styling and metallic numbers. Built with precision quartz movement for accuracy, this watch is as hard-wearing as it is stylish. Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 11 mm Dial shape: Square Warranty: 1 Year Stainless steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfort Ssteele logo on the 12-hour mark Date aperture at the 3-hour mark Steel bracelet with a butterfly clasp Black dial with quartz movement Screw to reset time and alarm Solid case back for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters -wearable while washing hands and in mild rain Comes in an authentic Maxima tin case
